issues.sample: The R&R valve/oil separator unit failed on my 2015 Audi S4 at approximately 71,000 miles.  This unit, when fails, can mix the oil and anti-freeze which can seize the engine.  I was able to catch the problem before engine failure.  Minneapolis Audi repaired the vehicle this week,

narrative.headline: What 2015 Audi S4 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (100% of reports).

issues.title: Engine
